name: llm-ta
paperTitle: LLM-TA: An LLM-Enhanced Textual Analytics Framework for Surgical AI Research
content:
## Introduction

LLMs excel at understanding surgical domain language; leverage for information extraction and knowledge synthesis. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

LLMs excel at understanding surgical domain language; leverage for information extraction and knowledge synthesis.

```
  └─→ Output
```
